context: Tests whether the agent uses fieldset/legend with hidden radio inputs for variant selectors, marks unavailable variants as disabled with sr-only text, and implements accessible form error patterns (aria-describedby, aria-invalid, role=alert) along with WCAG AA compliant color values.

checklist.name: Fieldset wrapper
checklist.description: Color and/or size variant selector uses a <fieldset> element as the outer wrapper

checklist.name: Legend present
checklist.description: The fieldset contains a <legend> element labelling the group (e.g. 'Color:' or 'Size:')

checklist.name: Radio inputs
checklist.description: Each swatch or size option is implemented as <input type="radio"> — NOT as div, span, or button with click handlers

checklist.name: Visual radio hidden
checklist.description: The radio inputs are visually hidden (sr-only class or equivalent) while remaining in the DOM and accessible

checklist.name: Swatch visual aria-hidden
checklist.description: The purely decorative swatch colour patch (the visual circle/square) has aria-hidden="true"

checklist.name: Unavailable variant disabled
checklist.description: Out-of-stock or unavailable variant options have the disabled attribute on the radio input

checklist.name: Out-of-stock sr-only text
checklist.description: Unavailable options include sr-only text communicating 'out of stock' (or equivalent) to screen reader users

checklist.name: aria-invalid on error
checklist.description: Form inputs in error state have aria-invalid="true"

checklist.name: aria-describedby for error
checklist.description: Form inputs in error state have aria-describedby pointing to the id of the error message element

checklist.name: role=alert on error message
checklist.description: The inline error message element has role="alert" so it is announced immediately

checklist.name: WCAG AA color contrast
checklist.description: The CSS defines price, sale price, or out-of-stock badge with specific color values that meet WCAG AA (e.g. dark text on white, or verified colour pairs) rather than generic grey or placeholder values

checklist.name: Semantic button/input elements
checklist.description: No interactive action triggers (add to cart, submit) are implemented as non-semantic div or span elements — all use <button> or <input type="submit">
